introduction: в—ҺиҜ‘гҖҖгҖҖеҗҚгҖҖж–ҜиҖғзү№зҡ„иҚЈиӘүв—ҺзүҮгҖҖгҖҖеҗҚгҖҖScouts Honorв—Һе№ҙгҖҖгҖҖд»ЈгҖҖ2009в—ҺеӣҪгҖҖгҖҖе®¶гҖҖзҫҺеӣҪв—Һзұ»гҖҖгҖҖеҲ«гҖҖе–ңеү§в—ҺиҜӯгҖҖгҖҖиЁҖгҖҖиӢұиҜӯв—Һеӯ—гҖҖгҖҖе№•гҖҖN/Aв—ҺIMDBиҜ„еҲҶ 3.9/10 (24 votes)в—ҺIMDBй“ҫжҺҘhttp://www.imdb.com/title/tt1389116в—Һж–Үд»¶ж јејҸгҖҖXviD + MP3в—Һи§Ҷйў‘е°әеҜёгҖҖ640 x 272в—Һж–Үд»¶еӨ§е°ҸгҖҖ1CD 50 x 15MBв—ҺзүҮгҖҖгҖҖй•ҝгҖҖ90 Minsв—ҺеҜјгҖҖгҖҖжј”гҖҖJesse Bryanв—Һдё»гҖҖгҖҖжј”гҖҖе…ӢйҮҢж–ҜВ·еҚЎеқҰ Chris Kattan  ....BrandonдҪӣиҺұеҫ·В·еЁҒжӢүзү№ Fred Willard  ....Game MasterDavid Schultz  ....David AppleorchardB.J. Bales  ....Tim AppleorchardKatie Bryan  ....CindyKip King  ....Mr. AppleorchardиүҫиҺұзү№жӢүВ·йҳҝз»ҙе…° Electra Avellan  ....AmyMatthew Funk  ....Scout Leader #3Eric Allard  ....JasperSean Goodman  ....JohnnyJohn Clem  ....Jasper (voice)Nicholes Cole  ....Scout Leader #4Nelson Diaz  ....Tiger Scout Leader #7Trey Fruge  ....Cop #1Ellie Gerber  ....Girl #1Bunny Gibson  ....Port O' Potty LadyJeff Howard  ....Scout Leader #2Mary Kegley  ....Tiger Scout Leader #6William Park  ....WilliamTim Piper  ....Officer McClaneAndreina Rios  ....Scout Leader #5Jennifer Sciole  ....Cop #2William Walton  ....Tiger Scout Leader #1Matthew Welk  ....Detectiveв—Һз®ҖгҖҖгҖҖд»ӢThe story begins with two not-so-bright brothers David & Tim Appleorchard (David Schultz & BJ Bales) who are on a mission to get their first Tiger Scout merit badges in 20 years before summerвҖҷs end in order to inherit the camp from their father, who is running off to join his wife in the circus. Standing in their way is evil brother and fellow scout, Brandon (вҖңSNLвҖҷsвҖқ Chris Kattan), who has his own designs on the camp.
